Media Object
Media Object base API
Data Fields
_transform Struct Reference

Transform C API handle, extending the base media handle.

#include <transform.h>

Data Fields

media_t media
 Base media handle (inherited).
 
int(* query_stream_dependencies )(const struct _transform *self, const char *name, const strings_t **dependencies)
 Query the dependencies of a stream.
 
int(* query_compatible_stream_caps )(const struct _transform *self, const char *name, const char *dependent_stream_name, const capabilities_t *dependent_stream_caps, capabilities_t **compatible_caps)
 Query stream capabilities with dependent stream constraints.
 
int(* do_process_stream )(const struct _transform *self, const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers)
 Process a stream.
 

Field Documentation

◆ do_process_stream

int(* _transform::do_process_stream) (const struct _transform *self, const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the IPP handle
[in]inputInput stream buffer
[out]outputOutput stream buffer
Note
Some output streams may have multiple dependencies with several input streams, so not necessarily ready to be computed. If an output stream is not ready to be computed due to pending input stream dependencies, its processing is deferred until all dependencies are completed.

TODO: how to inform how many output streams are requested?

◆ query_compatible_stream_caps

int(* _transform::query_compatible_stream_caps) (const struct _transform *self, const char *name, const char *dependent_stream_name, const capabilities_t *dependent_stream_caps, capabilities_t **compatible_caps)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the transform handle
[in]nameName of the stream to query capabilities for
[in]dependent_stream_nameName of the dependent stream
[in]dependent_stream_capsCapabilities of the dependent stream
[out]compatible_capsCompatible capabilities for the queried stream

◆ query_stream_dependencies

int(* _transform::query_stream_dependencies) (const struct _transform *self, const char *name, const strings_t **dependencies)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the IPP handle
[in]nameName of the stream
[out]dependenciesList of dependent streams
Note
dependencies is a NULL-terminated array
Generated by  1.12.0
